open_findings.message: Creating a free tier cluster is unavailable at this time in region swedencentral.
recommended_actions: Switch the Container Apps environment to a paid workload profile in swedencentral
Or move the deployment to germanywestcentral and rerun Step 6

decision_log.title: Initialize Workflow Guardrails
decision_log.choice: Start the Malta Catering workflow with a simple-complexity review budget.
decision_log.rationale: The project is a live demo with a narrow scope, so one adversarial pass in the early design stages is sufficient while keeping the workflow fast.

decision_log.title: Record Governance Discovery Outcome
decision_log.choice: Carry forward resource-group tag enforcement as the only hard blocker.
decision_log.rationale: Azure Policy discovery showed the deny condition was on resource-group tags, while the storage and Key Vault network posture stayed advisory for this scope.

decision_log.title: Approve Governance Gate
decision_log.choice: Complete governance with the tag-compliance blocker handed to planning and code generation.
decision_log.rationale: The blocker was actionable in deployment orchestration, so the workflow could proceed without reopening architecture.

decision_log.title: Select Phased Deployment Strategy
decision_log.choice: Implement the solution in four phases with AVM coverage for all planned Azure resources and native Bicep for budgeting.
decision_log.rationale: Phasing keeps dependencies explicit, simplifies rollback during demo setup, and fits the simple-complexity review profile.

decision_log.title: Clear Step 5 Preflight
decision_log.choice: Proceed with Bicep generation using verified AVM contracts and deployment-time resource-group tagging.
decision_log.rationale: Preflight confirmed full AVM coverage, identified the zone redundancy and ACR SKU caveats, and established deploy.ps1 as the right place to satisfy the resource-group tag deny policy.

decision_log.title: Complete Step 5 Validation
decision_log.choice: Mark the Bicep scaffold complete after build, lint, security-baseline, and artifact validation passed.
decision_log.rationale: The remaining compiler output is limited to upstream AVM Container Apps preview-type metadata warnings, not local code or policy defects.

decision_log.title: Block Step 6 On ACA Regional Capacity
decision_log.choice: Stop deployment after the Container Apps environment failed in swedencentral with ManagedEnvironmentCapacityHeavyUsageError.
decision_log.rationale: Azure explicitly recommended either an alternate region or a paid tier cluster. The current Bicep templates deploy the default serverless environment, so recovery requires a Step 5 IaC change before deploy can continue safely.

decision_log.title: Select Paid ACA Recovery Path
decision_log.choice: Use a paid Azure Container Apps workload profile in swedencentral instead of changing regions.
decision_log.rationale: The user selected the paid-tier recovery option, and swedencentral supports dedicated workload profiles. The next action is a Step 5 Bicep revision, not another Step 6 retry against the current consumption environment.

skip_reasons: simple complexity: challenger review opt-in only at Step 4
simple complexity: challenger review opt-in only at Step 5
simple complexity: challenger review opt-in only at Step 6
